title: Create: Gravel extractors - CGE
description: This is mine first mod for minecraft :) | This mod adds a new block called Gravel Extractor which can turn gravel into resources
body:
# **Theme image of the new update**
![Theme image of the new update](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11ae5b68e959949430a5e533c32ccecc09496a95.png)

# **Create: Gravel Extractors**

**Hello everyone**

My name is Bruno. This is my first mod.  
The mod is called **Create: Gravel Extractors**.

---

![Banner](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1156507/description_a580f17c-3bcf-417e-8f2e-3f5d91a7ac14.png)

![Banner 2](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1156507/description_d4d07b01-ef4c-4031-8b87-d062ab5f239d.png)

This mod adds **Gravel Extractors** that process **Gravel** into resources:

- Coal  
- Copper  
- Iron  
- Gold  
- Diamond  
- Netherite  
- Lapis Lazuli  
- Redstone  
- Amethyst  
- Emerald  
- Brass Nuggets  
- Andesite Alloy  
- Zinc Nuggets  

---

## **Important Information**

### **Required**
- **Create**  
  https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create

### **Recommended**
- **JEI**  
  https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jei

Works with all supported Create versions.

---

## **Made Using**

- Modding: https://mcreator.net/  
- Textures: https://www.getpaint.net/  
- 3D Models: https://www.blockbench.net/  
- Some textures are from Create

---
